items.title: Premature Evaluation: Steve Lacy Oh yeah?
items.summary: It’s all so fluid. The songs on Steve Lacy’s new album Oh yeah? seem to spill out of him with ease, without regard for definition or expectation.

items.title: The Orchestra (For Now)’s Joseph Scarisbrick Shares Debut Big Red Single “Isn’t He Funny?”
items.summary: The fresh-faced young musician Joseph Scarisbrick leads the Orchestra (For Now), the proggy and ambitious seven-piece London band who released the EP Plan 76 last year. But that's not Scarisbrick's only project. He's also the leader of Big Red, a trio that started off as a solo situation and came to include two other Orchestra (For Now) members, singer/bassist Millie Kirby and drummer Charlie Hancock.
items.audio: audio/The Orchestra _For Now__s Joseph Scarisbrick Share.mp3
